titles.text: サイバーエッグバトルチャンピオン

descriptions.text: Cyber Egg - Battle Champion is a chunky yet funky 3D battle action title with all of Bandai's anime experience shining through in the vibrant cast. Players wrestle for domination of the 3D arenas in their crustacean inspired mecha suits. Varied arenas add to the longevity of a ship shape title.
